content.text: Now let me create the job file and modify Kernel.php.

input.content:
format('H:i'); $currentDayOfWeek = $now->dayOfWeekIso; // 1=Monday, 7=Sunday $currentDayOfMonth = $now->day; $tasks = DB::table('daily_report_ai_email_tasks') ->where('is_on', 1) ->whereNull('deleted_at') ->where('send_time', $currentTime) ->get(); if ($tasks->isEmpty()) { return true; } foreach ($tasks as $task) { if (!$this->shouldSendNow($task->send_cycle, $currentDayOfWeek, $currentDayOfMonth)) { continue; } try { $this->processTask($task); } catch (\Throwable $e) { info("[DailyReportAiEmailJob] task={$task->id} failed: {$e->getMessage()}" . $e->getTraceAsString()); } } info('[DailyReportAiEmailJob] finished'); return true; } private function shouldSendNow(string $sendCycle, int $dayOfWeek, int $dayOfMonth): bool { return match ($sendCycle) { 'daily' => true, 'weekly_monday' => $dayOfWeek === 1, 'weekly_friday' => $dayOfWeek === 5, 'monthly_first' => $dayOfMonth === 1, default => false, }; } private function processTask(object $task): void { $sfuserId = $task->sfuser_id; // 读取邮箱配置 $mc = MailConfig::where('type', "daily_report_{$sfuserId}")->first(); if (!$mc || empty(Arr::get($mc->config, 'to_email'))) { info("[DailyReportAiEmailJob] task={$task->id} no email config, skip"); return; } $toEmails = Arr::get($mc->config, 'to_email'); $sfuserToken = Arr::get($mc->config, 'sfuser_authorized_token', ''); if (!$sfuserToken) { info("[DailyReportAiEmailJob] task={$task->id} no sfuser_token, skip"); return; } // 确定日报日期范围 [$startDate, $endDate] = $this->getDateRange($task->report_range); // 拉取日报数据 $dailyService = app(DailyReportService::class); $focusUserIds = $dailyService->getSubordinates($sfuserId); $data = $dailyService->getOthersDailyReportListEnable( $startDate, $endDate, $sfuserId, $focusUserIds['focus_users'], 10000 ); if (empty($data) || empty($data['reports']) || empty($data['reports']['report_list'])) { info("[DailyReportAiEmailJob] task={$task->id} no report data, skip"); return; } // 构建邮件内容（加密格式，由 oa-core 解密） $content = ''; $no = 0; foreach ($data['reports']['report_list'] as $report) { $nickname = $report['data']['nickname'] ?? ''; if (empty($nickname)) { continue; } $nickname = EncryptService::app()->markEncrString($nickname); $reportContent = EncryptService::app()->markEncrString($report['content']); ++$no; $content .= '

' . $no . '、 ' . $nickname . '

'; $content .= '
' . $reportContent . '
'; } $subject = "【{$startDate}】 {$task->name} - AI 分析"; // 构建邮件参数（手动构建以支持 ai_analysis_config） $params = [ 'decrypt_config' => [ 'obj' => '$this', 'decrypt_columns' => [], 'partly_decrypt_columns' => ['content', 'subject'], ], 'receivers' => [[ 'type' => 'token', 'tokens' => [$sfuserToken], 'filter' => 'emails', 'filter_map' => ['emails' => $toEmails], ]], 'content' => $content, 'subject' => $subject, 'ai_analysis_config' => [ 'system_prompt' => $task->system_prompt, ], ]; info("[DailyReportAiEmailJob] task={$task->id} sending email to " . implode(',', $toEmails)); CoreApiLib::sendRequest('master-api/mail/send-decr', $params); info("[DailyReportAiEmailJob] task={$task->id} email sent"); } private function getDateRange(string $reportRange): array { $today = now()->toDateString(); return match ($reportRange) { 'today' => [$today, $today], 'yesterday' => [now()->subDay()->toDateString(), now()->subDay()->toDateString()], default => [$today, $today], }; } }

**Modified:**
